get.description: This operation lists bucket storage integrations in a project. It returns public storage integration statuses only.

zh-CN.description: 本接口用于列出指定项目中的对象存储集成，仅返回可公开展示的集成状态。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be an API key with appropriate privileges.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为具备适当权限的 API 密钥。

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of records to include in each response.

200.description: Returns the list of storage integrations.

zh-CN.description: 返回 Storage Integration 列表。

data.description: Returns the list of storage integrations.

zh-CN.description: 返回 Storage Integration 列表。

post.description: This operation creates a bucket storage integration after validating that the supplied credential can access the target bucket or container.

zh-CN.description: 本接口用于创建对象存储集成。创建前，系统会校验提供的凭证是否可以访问目标 bucket 或容器。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be an API key with appropriate privileges.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为具备适当权限的 API 密钥。

get.description: This operation gets details of a bucket storage integration. The project scope is resolved from the integration ID.

zh-CN.description: 本接口用于查看对象存储集成详情。系统会根据集成 ID 解析所属项目。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be an API key with appropriate privileges.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为具备适当权限的 API 密钥。

parameters.name: integrationId
parameters.description: The ID of the storage integration.

zh-CN.description: 返回 Storage Integration 详情。
返回 Storage Integration 详情。

delete.description: This operation deletes a bucket storage integration. The project scope is resolved from the integration ID.

zh-CN.description: 本接口用于删除对象存储集成。系统会根据集成 ID 解析所属项目。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be an API key with appropriate privileges.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为具备适当权限的 API 密钥。

parameters.name: integrationId
parameters.description: The ID of the storage integration.

post.description: This operation validates whether the supplied storage credential can access the target bucket or container without creating an integration record.

zh-CN.description: 本接口用于校验提供的存储凭证是否可以访问目标 bucket 或容器，不会创建集成记录。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be an API key with appropriate privileges.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为具备适当权限的 API 密钥。

post.description: This operation generates provider-specific authorization materials that are required before creating or validating a storage integration.

zh-CN.summary: 生成 Storage Integration 授权材料
zh-CN.description: 本接口用于生成创建或校验 Storage Integration 前所需的云厂商授权材料。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be an API key with appropriate privileges.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为具备适当权限的 API 密钥。
返回云厂商相关的授权材料。

anyOf.description: A success response for AWS S3.

data.description: Returns the AWS S3 authorization materials.

zh-CN.description: 返回 AWS S3 授权材料。

anyOf.description: A success response for GCP GCS.

data.description: Returns the GCP GCS authorization materials.

zh-CN.description: 返回 GCP GCS 授权材料。

anyOf.description: A success response for Azure Blob.

data.description: Returns the Azure Blob authorization materials.

zh-CN.description: 返回 Azure Blob 授权材料。

anyOf.description: A success response for Alibaba Cloud OSS.

zh-CN.description: Alibaba Cloud OSS 成功响应。

data.description: Returns the Alibaba Cloud OSS authorization materials.

zh-CN.description: 返回 Alibaba Cloud OSS 授权材料。

ExternalCred.description: Provider-specific credential fields for the storage integration. Only fields relevant to the target cloud are required.

zh-CN.description: Storage Integration 的云厂商凭证字段。仅目标云厂商相关字段为必需。

roleArn.description: The AWS IAM role ARN or Alibaba Cloud RAM role ARN.

zh-CN.description: AWS IAM 角色 ARN 或阿里云 RAM 角色 ARN。

externalId.description: The external ID for AWS or Alibaba Cloud role assumption.

zh-CN.description: AWS 或阿里云角色扮演使用的 external ID。

clientId.description: The Azure federated identity client ID.

zh-CN.description: Azure 联合身份客户端 ID。
用户侧 GCP 项目 ID。

serviceAccountEmail.description: The customer-created GCP service account email that grants bucket access.

zh-CN.description: 用户创建的 GCP 服务账号邮箱，用于授予 bucket 访问权限。

name.description: The name of the storage integration.

description.description: A description of the storage integration.

regionId.description: The ID of the region. The server uses this field to derive the cloud provider.

zh-CN.description: 地域 ID。服务器会根据该字段推断云厂商。

bucketName.description: The bucket, container, or storage name. For Azure Blob Storage, this is the container name.

zh-CN.description: Bucket、容器或存储名称。对于 Azure Blob Storage，该字段表示容器名称。

externalId.description: The external ID for AWS role assumption.

zh-CN.description: AWS 角色扮演使用的 external ID。
云厂商相关的凭证字段。

name.description: The name of the storage integration.

description.description: A description of the storage integration.

regionId.description: The ID of the region. The server uses this field to derive the cloud provider.

zh-CN.description: 地域 ID。服务器会根据该字段推断云厂商。

bucketName.description: The bucket, container, or storage name. For Azure Blob Storage, this is the container name.

zh-CN.description: Bucket、容器或存储名称。对于 Azure Blob Storage，该字段表示容器名称。
用户侧 GCP 项目 ID。

serviceAccountEmail.description: The customer-created GCP service account email that grants bucket access.

zh-CN.description: 用户创建的 GCP 服务账号邮箱，用于授予 bucket 访问权限。
云厂商相关的凭证字段。

name.description: The name of the storage integration.

description.description: A description of the storage integration.

regionId.description: The ID of the region. The server uses this field to derive the cloud provider.

zh-CN.description: 地域 ID。服务器会根据该字段推断云厂商。

bucketName.description: The bucket, container, or storage name. For Azure Blob Storage, this is the container name.

zh-CN.description: Bucket、容器或存储名称。对于 Azure Blob Storage，该字段表示容器名称。

clientId.description: The Azure federated identity client ID.

zh-CN.description: Azure 联合身份客户端 ID。

tenantId.description: The Azure federated identity tenant ID.

zh-CN.description: Azure 联合身份租户 ID。
云厂商相关的凭证字段。

regionId.description: The ID of the region. The server uses this field to derive the cloud provider.

zh-CN.description: 地域 ID。服务器会根据该字段推断云厂商。

bucketName.description: The bucket, container, or storage name to validate.

zh-CN.description: 需要校验的 bucket、容器或存储名称。
云厂商相关的凭证字段。

regionId.description: The ID of the region. The server uses this field to derive the cloud provider.

zh-CN.description: 地域 ID。服务器会根据该字段推断云厂商。

bucketName.description: The bucket, container, or storage name used to generate policies or credentials.

zh-CN.description: 用于生成策略或凭证的 bucket、容器或存储名称。

integrationId.description: The ID of the storage integration.

name.description: The name of the storage integration.

status.description: The public status of the storage integration.

message.description: The status message. This field is empty when there is no message.

zh-CN.description: 状态信息。没有状态信息时为空字符串。

bucketName.description: The bucket, container, or storage name.

storageIntegrations.description: The current page of storage integration summaries.

zh-CN.description: 当前页的 Storage Integration 概览。

count.description: The total number of visible storage integrations after filtering.

zh-CN.description: 过滤后的可见 Storage Integration 总数。

description.description: A description of the storage integration.

externalCred.description: Provider-specific credential fields stored for this integration. Fields with null values are omitted.

zh-CN.description: 该集成保存的云厂商凭证字段。值为 null 的字段会被省略。

createTime.description: The creation time in UTC ISO 8601 format.

zh-CN.description: UTC ISO 8601 格式的创建时间。

integrationId.description: The ID of the storage integration.

name.description: The name of the storage integration.

success.description: Whether the credential can access the target storage.

zh-CN.description: 凭证是否可以访问目标存储。

message.description: The failure reason when validation fails. This field is empty when validation succeeds.

zh-CN.description: 校验失败时的原因。校验成功时为空字符串。

readonly.description: The read-only AWS S3 policy. Possible values are `s3:GetObject`, `s3:ListBucket`, and `s3:GetBucketLocation`.

zh-CN.description: 只读 AWS S3 策略。可能的值为 `s3:GetObject`、`s3:ListBucket` 和 `s3:GetBucketLocation`。

readwrite.description: The read-write AWS S3 policy. Possible values are `s3:GetObject`, `s3:ListBucket`, `s3:GetBucketLocation`, and `s3:PutObject`.

zh-CN.description: 读写 AWS S3 策略。可能的值为 `s3:GetObject`、`s3:ListBucket`、`s3:GetBucketLocation` 和 `s3:PutObject`。

iamPolicy.description: The AWS IAM policy used by the create workflow. Possible values are `s3:GetObject`, `s3:ListBucket`, `s3:GetBucketLocation`, and `s3:PutObject`.

zh-CN.description: 创建流程使用的 AWS IAM 策略。可能的值为 `s3:GetObject`、`s3:ListBucket`、`s3:GetBucketLocation` 和 `s3:PutObject`。

zillizAccount.description: The Zilliz cloud account or RAM principal to authorize.

zh-CN.description: 需要授权的 Zilliz 云账号或 RAM 主体。

permission.description: The GCP bucket permissions to grant.

zh-CN.description: 需要授予的 GCP bucket 权限。

googleCloudServiceAccount.description: The Zilliz-managed Google Cloud service account email.

zh-CN.description: Zilliz 托管的 Google Cloud 服务账号邮箱。

clusterIssuerUrl.description: The cluster issuer URL for Azure federated identity.

zh-CN.description: Azure 联合身份使用的集群 issuer URL。

namespace.description: The Kubernetes namespace used by the Zilliz service account.

zh-CN.description: Zilliz 服务账号所在的 Kubernetes 命名空间。

readonly.description: The Alibaba Cloud OSS policy. Possible values are `oss:GetObject`, `oss:ListObjects`, `oss:GetBucketLocation`, and `oss:HeadBucket`.

zh-CN.description: 只读阿里云 OSS 策略。可能的值为 `oss:GetObject`、`oss:ListObjects`、`oss:GetBucketLocation` 和 `oss:HeadBucket`。

readwrite.description: The read-write Alibaba Cloud OSS policy. Possible values are `oss:GetObject`, `oss:ListObjects`, `oss:GetBucketLocation`, `oss.HeadBucket`, and `oss:PutObject`.

zh-CN.description: 读写阿里云 OSS 策略。可能的值为 `oss:GetObject`、`oss:ListObjects`、`oss:GetBucketLocation`、`oss:HeadBucket` 和 `oss:PutObject`。

ramPolicy.description: The Alibaba Cloud RAM policy used by the create workflow. Possible values are `oss:GetObject`, `oss:ListObjects`, `oss:GetBucketLocation`, `oss.HeadBucket`, and `oss:PutObject`.

zh-CN.description: 创建流程使用的阿里云 RAM 策略。可能的值为 `oss:GetObject`、`oss:ListObjects`、`oss:GetBucketLocation`、`oss:HeadBucket` 和 `oss:PutObject`。

zillizAccount.description: The Zilliz cloud account or RAM principal to authorize.

zh-CN.description: 需要授权的 Zilliz 云账号或 RAM 主体。
